subcodes.first_line: Jinab-i-Aqa Ahmad, thou art but one who holdeth his hand from afar over the fire, unaware of what transpireth. Brief repose hath been severed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب آقا احمد دستی از دور بر آتش داری نمیدانی چه خبر است مختصر آرام منقطع است
subcodes.subjects: @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha
